song.title: Draw Me, Dear Lord
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D G D G D Draw me, dear Lord. |Draw me today. . G D A From everything else, dear Lord, |draw me away.
[V2] .D G Lord, this whole world .D G Seems to weigh me down. .D G All the cares, the strife, the sin, .D A Within me and all around.
[V3] But, Lord, I want to set my heart, And Lord I want to stay with You. 'Cause only when You're near to me Is everything okay.
[V4] And though everything may fall apart, Or everything go my way, It doesn't really matter, Lord, As long as I gain You today.
